// Generated by xlsynth::aot_builder from build spec "compound_shapes".
// top="compound_shapes"
// function="__xlsynth_standalone_compound_shapes"

pub use xlsynth_aot_runtime::{AotArtifactMetadata, AotError, AotRunResult, SBits, UBits};
#[allow(unused_imports)]
use xlsynth_aot_runtime::{
    read_leaf_element, write_leaf_element, AotElementLayout, AotRunnerLayout,
    StandaloneRunner,
};
unsafe extern "C" {
    #[link_name = "__xlsynth_standalone_compound_shapes"]
    fn __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_compound_shapes();
}
const INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[6, 4];
const INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[8, 8];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[10];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[8];
const RUNNER_LAYOUT: AotRunnerLayout = AotRunnerLayout {
    input_buffer_sizes: INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES,
    input_buffer_alignments: INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS,
    output_buffer_sizes: OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES,
    output_buffer_alignments: OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS,
    temp_buffer_size: 0,
    temp_buffer_alignment: 1,
};
/// Runtime-visible metadata for the generated standalone artifact.
pub const ARTIFACT_METADATA: AotArtifactMetadata = AotArtifactMetadata {
    abi_version: 1,
    entrypoint_symbol: "__xlsynth_standalone_compound_shapes",
    has_asserts: false,
    has_traces: false,
};
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Token {}
pub type Bits8 = u8;
pub type Bits16 = u16;
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Input0 {
    pub field0: Bits8,
    pub field1: [Bits16; 2],
}
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Input1 {
    pub field0: Bits16,
    pub field1: [Bits8; 2],
}
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct OutputField1 {
    pub field0: Bits8,
    pub field1: Bits16,
}
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Output {
    pub field0: [Bits16; 2],
    pub field1: OutputField1,
    pub field2: [Bits8; 2],
}
const INPUT0_LAYOUT: &[AotElementLayout] = &[
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 4,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
];
const INPUT1_LAYOUT: &[AotElementLayout] = &[
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 3,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
];
const OUTPUT0_LAYOUT: &[AotElementLayout] = &[
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 4,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 6,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 8,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 9,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
];
#[allow(clippy::deref_addrof, clippy::explicit_auto_deref, clippy::identity_op)]
fn encode_input_0(_value: &Input0, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 6);
    dst.fill(0);
    write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &((_value).field0).to_ne_bytes());
    for index_0 in 0..2 {
        write_leaf_element(
            dst,
            &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1 + index_0],
            &(((_value).field1)[index_0]).to_ne_bytes(),
        );
    }
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 3);
}
#[allow(clippy::deref_addrof, clippy::explicit_auto_deref, clippy::identity_op)]
fn encode_input_1(_value: &Input1, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 4);
    dst.fill(0);
    write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT1_LAYOUT[0usize], &((_value).field0).to_ne_bytes());
    for index_0 in 0..2 {
        write_leaf_element(
            dst,
            &INPUT1_LAYOUT[0usize + 1 + index_0],
            &(((_value).field1)[index_0]).to_ne_bytes(),
        );
    }
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT1_LAYOUT.len(), 3);
}
#[allow(clippy::identity_op, clippy::let_and_return)]
fn decode_output_0(src: &[u8]) -> Output {
    debug_assert_eq!(src.len(), 10);
    let output: Output = Output {
        field0: std::array::from_fn(|index_0| {
            {
                let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 2];
                read_leaf_element(
                    src,
                    &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + index_0],
                    &mut dst_bytes,
                );
                let decoded = u16::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
                decoded
            }
        }),
        field1: OutputField1 {
            field0: {
                let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
                read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 2], &mut dst_bytes);
                let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
                decoded
            },
            field1: {
                let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 2];
                read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 2 + 1], &mut dst_bytes);
                let decoded = u16::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
                decoded
            },
        },
        field2: std::array::from_fn(|index_1| {
            {
                let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
                read_leaf_element(
                    src,
                    &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 4 + index_1],
                    &mut dst_bytes,
                );
                let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
                decoded
            }
        }),
    };
    debug_assert_eq!(OUTPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 6);
    output
}
/// Reusable runner for the generated standalone AOT entrypoint.
///
/// A runner caches the standalone ABI buffers; create one runner per
/// concurrent caller instead of sharing it across threads.
pub struct Runner {
    inner: StandaloneRunner,
}
impl Runner {
    /// Creates a reusable runner for the generated standalone entrypoint.
    ///
    /// # Errors
    ///
    /// Returns an error if the standalone artifact metadata cannot initialize
    /// the ABI buffers required by the generated entrypoint.
    pub fn new() -> Result<Self, AotError> {
        Ok(Self {
            inner: unsafe {
                StandaloneRunner::new(
                    &ARTIFACT_METADATA,
                    __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_compound_shapes as *const (),
                    &RUNNER_LAYOUT,
                )?
            },
        })
    }
    /// Runs the entrypoint and returns the output together with assertion
    /// events.
    ///
    /// # Errors
    ///
    /// Returns an error if standalone ABI buffer initialization or output
    /// decoding fails.
    pub fn run_with_events(
        &mut self,
        lhs: &Input0,
        rhs: &Input1,
    ) -> Result<AotRunResult<Output>, AotError> {
        encode_input_0(lhs, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        encode_input_1(rhs, self.inner.input_mut(1));
        self.inner.run_raw();
        Ok(AotRunResult {
            output: decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0)),
            assert_messages: self.inner.assert_messages().to_vec(),
        })
    }
    /// Runs the entrypoint and returns only the decoded output value.
    ///
    /// # Errors
    ///
    /// Returns an error if output decoding fails or an XLS assertion fires.
    pub fn run(&mut self, lhs: &Input0, rhs: &Input1) -> Result<Output, AotError> {
        encode_input_0(lhs, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        encode_input_1(rhs, self.inner.input_mut(1));
        self.inner.run_raw();
        if let Some(first_assertion) = self.inner.assert_messages().first() {
            return Err(AotError(format!("XLS assertion failed: {first_assertion}")));
        }
        Ok(decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0)))
    }
}
/// Creates a reusable runner for the generated standalone entrypoint.
pub fn new_runner() -> Result<Runner, AotError> {
    Runner::new()
}
